title: bolbitis subcordata var. media
intro: Bolbitis subcordata var. media, also known as Bolbitis media, is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and New Guinea. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an anti-diarrheal agent. Bolbitis media can be prepared for consumption through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a medical professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
